notes: Class 1B with -r aorist infix: bëra/bëre/bëri/bëmë/bëtë/bënë. Imperative 2sg restores the -j (bëj).
Multi-sense translationEn 'to open; bloom' uses ';' separator that the gloss first-sense picker doesn't split — explicit override picks 'open' as the primary English sense.
Stem 'djeg' palatalizes to 'digj' before consonant-cluster suffixes (present 2pl, all imperfect, all MP). Aorist stem 'dogj' is pre-mutated.
Highly irregular Class 3 verb with extensive stem alternation (dua/do, duam/doni). Optative uses a different aorist-like stem (daç-). Cells enumerated against Kaikki.

Defective: in practice only 3sg/3pl forms are used. englishForms uses defective 'must' for present and 'had to' periphrasis for past/perfect (the only English equivalent that conjugates across tenses).
Three present-system stems: flas (1sg/1pl/3pl), flet (2sg/3sg), flis (2pl + all imperfect). Aorist takes Class 2 endings on stem 'fol'.

Aorist stem is consonant-final (hëngr), so aorist takes Class 2 endings rather than the Class 3 -va/-ve/-u/-më/-të/-në that the present-class implies. Subjunctive 3sg present is 'të haje' (not 'të hajë').
Kaikki has malformed aorist 3sg entry (hekuroshekuros); engine produces hekurosi which matches the regular -os pattern.

Class 2D pattern: 1sg present takes -i, 2sg/3sg present take -ën, aorist 3sg takes -u. Encoded via cellOverrides rather than introducing a new paradigm class for one verb. Intransitive — no MP voice in standard Albanian.

sources.reference: fully suppletive — engine consults hardcoded suppletion table

notes: Auxiliary verb. Engine bypasses paradigm machinery via suppletion.ts. englishForms override triggers be-copula virtualization in english-gloss.ts so simple-tense glosses use am/are/is/was/were rather than the bare 'be'.
Suppletive aorist (dhash). MP present alternates stem to 'jep' before MP endings.
Class 1B vowel-stem -j: aorist 3sg uses -u (lau, not lai), aorist plurals retain -ë (lamë/latë/lanë). Imperative 2sg restores the -j (laj).
Albanian intransitive 'be born'. englishForms override gives the be-compound that english-gloss.ts virtualizes for correct simple-tense agreement (we were born, am I born?, etc.).
Stem 'marr' alternates to 'merr' in present 2sg/3sg/2pl and all imperfect. Aorist takes Class 2 endings on the suppletive stem 'mor'.
Modal usage typically 'mund të' + subjunctive of main verb. englishForms override picks 'be able' (the 'can' second sense isn't useful as a finite English verb across the grid).
Class 1 -ij verb. Aorist 3sg uses -u (ngriu); aorist plurals retain -ë (ngrimë/ngritë/ngrinë). Participle ngrirë.
Stem 'pjek' palatalizes to 'piq' before consonant-cluster suffixes (present 2pl, all imperfect, all MP). Aorist stem 'poq' is pre-mutated.
Aorist stem ndenj takes Class 2 endings (consonant stem). Optative is built from aorist stem with -ça-/-ç family endings.
Class 1 -ej irregular. Present stem shërbe; aorist stem shërbye (e → ye); participle shërbyer.
Suppletive active paradigm. MP cells alternate stem to 'shih' before MP endings.
translationEn 'to translate to Albanian' is verbose for the gloss grid; override 'translate' yields the cleaner gloss line ('I translate', 'I translated', etc.).
Three-stem alternation: tërheq (1sg/1pl/3pl), tërhiq (2pl + all imperfect), tërhoq (aorist).
Suppletive across tenses; corpus auxiliary 'kam' chosen per Husić. Intransitive — no MP voice (vihem belongs to vë 'to put', a different verb).
